hero_subtitle: Beyond the Classroom — Sports, Clubs, and Holistic Development
sports_intro: We believe in nurturing talent through competitive and recreational sports. Our learners participate in inter-school competitions and annual sports events.

sports.name: Football
sports.description: Boys and girls teams compete in local leagues

sports.name: Netball
sports.description: Girls netball team with regular training

events.title: Sports Day
events.description: Annual inter-house competitions in athletics, football, and netball. Parents are invited to participate.

events.title: Graduation Ceremony
events.description: Celebrating Grade 6 learners transitioning to Junior Secondary.

events.title: Christmas Party
events.description: End-of-year celebration with performances, games, and fun activities.

events.title: Cultural Day
events.description: Celebrating Kenya's diverse cultures through music, dance, and food.

events.title: Open Day
events.description: Parents visit classrooms to see learners' work and meet teachers.

events.title: Prize Giving Day
events.description: Recognizing academic excellence and co-curricular achievements.

testimonials.text: My daughter improved in confidence after joining drama club. She's now in Grade 5 and loves performing.
testimonials.author: Mrs. Wanjiku

testimonials.text: The chess club has transformed my son's critical thinking. He represents the school in competitions.
testimonials.author: Mr. Otieno

testimonials.text: The sports program is excellent. My daughter made new friends and stays active through netball.
testimonials.author: Mrs. Kamau
